entities.description: A statistical technique for analyzing a sequence of data points collected over time

entities.description: A test used in time series analysis to identify structural breaks

entities.description: A test to determine if a time series has a constant mean and variance over time

entities.description: A test to determine if a long-term relationship exists between non-stationary time series

entities.description: A model used to estimate the short-run and long-run relationships between variables
